researchResults.title: SandboxAQ brings its drug discovery models to Claude — no PhD in computing required
researchResults.description: Other venture-backed companies like Chai Discovery and Isomorphic Labs have raced to build better models. SandboxAQ is betting that access is the bigger obstacle and that Claude solves it.

researchResults.title: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
researchResults.description: Stainless, a New York-based startup, founded in 2022, rose to prominence in the emerging AI industry for automating the creation and maintenance of software development kits, or SDKs — the libraries developers use to interact with APIs.

researchResults.title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
researchResults.description: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI co-founders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late.

researchResults.title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
researchResults.description: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.

researchResults.title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
researchResults.description: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it — could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

researchResults.title: NVIDIA's CEO Projects $1 Trillion in AI Chip Sales as New Computing Era Begins
